title: The Trojan
description: It seems to be an ordinary mod, but what's wrong with it....
body:
# The mod is frozen!Bugs are possible! I'm waiting for you in a new fashion-smile!;)(not available yet)
 
 It's not a virus! Only horror :) 
 
 _You are an ordinary player who wanted to download a regular mod, but something went wrong..._
 
 NEED A GeckoLib
# ![the trojan](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5391ff5bde9c599a8c035f92c2a088de4dcaabcb.png)
> **The mod can have loud sounds, harsh screamers, and much more, the mod is based on the player's action in the world, the mod has its own end, so you can try to disable the system to the end!
> and know that he sees your every action.
There should be no bugs or crashes in the mod, but if you do find them, please write about it in the comments, and I will try to fix this bug as soon as possible!**

- _The mod was inspired by an anomaly, no more, it's not a mimic-type dweller and it's not related to The Broken Script, if there are similar events in it or so on, then I'm sorry:(_
### (I'm sorry if something is not written correctly, everything was written through a translator, I don't know English very well, sorry)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


What does the mod add?
- 2 Characters called virus or trojan

- The system that is for you

- A hacked system, beware of it, it's clearly not for you...
 
- And a broken system, it clearly wants you out of this world....
